---
title: "Labour Market Data"
format: html
---

## Labour Market Trends Explorer

Interactive visualisation of labour force participation, employment, and unemployment indicators based on TÜİK Household Labour Force Survey results.

::: {.source-note}
**Source:** TÜİK Household Labour Force Survey Results — [TÜİK Statistical Themes / Veri Portalı](https://veriportali.tuik.gov.tr/tr/statistical-themes){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.lab-toolbar}
::: {.indicator-buttons}
<button class="indicator-btn active" data-indicator="lfpr">LFPR</button>
<button class="indicator-btn" data-indicator="employment">Employment</button>
<button class="indicator-btn" data-indicator="unemployment">Unemployment</button>
:::

::: {.lang-toggle}
<button class="lang-btn active" data-lang="en">EN</button>
<button class="lang-btn" data-lang="tr">TR</button>
:::
:::

::: {.lab-controls}
::: {.lab-control}
<label for="startYear"><strong>Start Year</strong></label>
<select id="startYear"></select>
:::

::: {.lab-control}
<label for="endYear"><strong>End Year</strong></label>
<select id="endYear"></select>
:::
:::

<div class="lab-summary" id="labSummary"></div>
<div class="lab-commentary" id="labCommentary"></div>
<div id="labourChart" style="width:100%;height:540px;"></div>

::: {.download-bar}
[Download CSV](/data/labour_market.csv){.tool-link download=""}
:::

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>
<script>
async function loadCSV(path) {
  const response = await fetch(path);
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error("CSV file could not be loaded.");
  const text = await response.text();

  const lines = text.trim().split("\n");
  const headers = lines[0].split(",");

  return lines.slice(1).map(line => {
    const values = line.split(",");
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h, i) => obj[h.trim()] = values[i]?.trim());
    obj.year = +obj.year;
    obj.total = +obj.total;
    obj.male = +obj.male;
    obj.female = +obj.female;
    return obj;
  });
}

const labels = {
  en: {
    lfpr: "Labour Force Participation Rate",
    employment: "Employment Rate",
    unemployment: "Unemployment Rate",
    total: "Total",
    male: "Male",
    female: "Female",
    year: "Year",
    rate: "Rate (%)",
    selectedIndicator: "Selected Indicator",
    selectedYear: "Selected Year",
    sourceTitle: "Source-based note",
    commentaryRise: "The selected indicator shows an upward pattern compared with the beginning of the selected period.",
    commentaryFall: "The selected indicator shows a downward pattern compared with the beginning of the selected period.",
    commentaryStable: "The selected indicator appears broadly stable compared with the beginning of the selected period.",
    femaleGap: "The female series remains below the male series in the selected year.",
    maleGap: "The male series remains below the female series in the selected year.",
    equalGap: "Male and female values are equal or nearly equal in the selected year."
  },
  tr: {
    lfpr: "İşgücüne Katılma Oranı",
    employment: "İstihdam Oranı",
    unemployment: "İşsizlik Oranı",
    total: "Toplam",
    male: "Erkek",
    female: "Kadın",
    year: "Yıl",
    rate: "Oran (%)",
    selectedIndicator: "Seçili Gösterge",
    selectedYear: "Seçili Yıl",
    sourceTitle: "Kaynak notu",
    commentaryRise: "Seçilen gösterge, seçilen dönemin başlangıcına göre artış eğilimi göstermektedir.",
    commentaryFall: "Seçilen gösterge, seçilen dönemin başlangıcına göre düşüş eğilimi göstermektedir.",
    commentaryStable: "Seçilen gösterge, seçilen dönemin başlangıcına göre genel olarak yatay seyretmektedir.",
    femaleGap: "Seçili yılda kadın serisi erkek serisinin altında kalmaktadır.",
    maleGap: "Seçili yılda erkek serisi kadın serisinin altında kalmaktadır.",
    equalGap: "Seçili yılda kadın ve erkek değerleri eşit ya da birbirine çok yakındır."
  }
};

let currentIndicator = "lfpr";
let currentLang = "en";
let labourData = [];

function t(key) {
  return labels[currentLang][key] || key;
}

function populateYearSelect(selectEl, years, selectedValue) {
  selectEl.innerHTML = "";
  years.forEach(year => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = year;
    option.textContent = year;
    if (year === selectedValue) option.selected = true;
    selectEl.appendChild(option);
  });
}

function filteredRows(data, indicator, startYear, endYear) {
  return data
    .filter(d => d.indicator === indicator && d.year >= startYear && d.year <= endYear)
    .sort((a, b) => a.year - b.year);
}

function updateSummary(data, indicator, endYear) {
  const row = data.find(d => d.year === endYear && d.indicator === indicator);
  const summary = document.getElementById("labSummary");
  if (!summary) return;

  if (!row) {
    summary.innerHTML = "";
    return;
  }

  summary.innerHTML = `
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">${t("selectedIndicator")}</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${t(indicator)}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">${t("selectedYear")}</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.year}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">${t("total")}</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.total}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">${t("male")}</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.male}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">${t("female")}</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.female}</div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function updateCommentary(rows) {
  const box = document.getElementById("labCommentary");
  if (!box) return;

  if (!rows.length) {
    box.innerHTML = "";
    return;
  }

  const first = rows[0];
  const last = rows[rows.length - 1];
  const diff = +(last.total - first.total).toFixed(1);

  let trendText = "";
  if (diff > 0.3) trendText = t("commentaryRise");
  else if (diff < -0.3) trendText = t("commentaryFall");
  else trendText = t("commentaryStable");

  let gapText = "";
  if (last.female < last.male) gapText = t("femaleGap");
  else if (last.male < last.female) gapText = t("maleGap");
  else gapText = t("equalGap");

  box.innerHTML = `
    <div class="commentary-card">
      <div class="commentary-title">${t("sourceTitle")}</div>
      <p>${trendText}</p>
      <p>${gapText}</p>
    </div>
  `;
}

function drawChart(rows, indicator) {
  const chartEl = document.getElementById("labourChart");
  if (!chartEl) return;

  const years = rows.map(d => d.year);

  const traces = [
    { x: years, y: rows.map(d => d.total), mode: "lines+markers", name: t("total") },
    { x: years, y: rows.map(d => d.male), mode: "lines+markers", name: t("male") },
    { x: years, y: rows.map(d => d.female), mode: "lines+markers", name: t("female") }
  ];

  const layout = {
    title: t(indicator),
    xaxis: { title: t("year") },
    yaxis: { title: t("rate") },
    margin: { t: 60, r: 20, b: 60, l: 60 },
    hovermode: "x unified"
  };

  Plotly.newPlot("labourChart", traces, layout, {
    responsive: true,
    displaylogo: false,
    toImageButtonOptions: {
      format: "png",
      filename: "labour_market_chart",
      height: 700,
      width: 1200,
      scale: 1
    }
  });
}

function refresh() {
  const startYear = +document.getElementById("startYear").value;
  const endYear = +document.getElementById("endYear").value;
  if (startYear > endYear) return;

  const rows = filteredRows(labourData, currentIndicator, startYear, endYear);
  drawChart(rows, currentIndicator);
  updateSummary(labourData, currentIndicator, endYear);
  updateCommentary(rows);
}

async function initLabourMarketTool() {
  labourData = await loadCSV("/data/labour_market.csv");

  const allYears = [...new Set(labourData.map(d => d.year))].sort((a, b) => a - b);

  populateYearSelect(document.getElementById("startYear"), allYears, allYears[0]);
  populateYearSelect(document.getElementById("endYear"), allYears, allYears[allYears.length - 1]);

  document.querySelectorAll(".indicator-btn").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      document.querySelectorAll(".indicator-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
      btn.classList.add("active");
      currentIndicator = btn.dataset.indicator;
      refresh();
    });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".lang-btn").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      document.querySelectorAll(".lang-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
      btn.classList.add("active");
      currentLang = btn.dataset.lang;

      const startLabel = document.querySelector('label[for="startYear"] strong');
      const endLabel = document.querySelector('label[for="endYear"] strong');
      if (startLabel) startLabel.textContent = currentLang === "tr" ? "Başlangıç Yılı" : "Start Year";
      if (endLabel) endLabel.textContent = currentLang === "tr" ? "Bitiş Yılı" : "End Year";

      refresh();
    });
  });

  document.getElementById("startYear").addEventListener("change", refresh);
  document.getElementById("endYear").addEventListener("change", refresh);

  refresh();
}

initLabourMarketTool().catch(err => {
  const chartEl = document.getElementById("labourChart");
  if (chartEl) {
    chartEl.innerHTML = `<p style="color:#b91c1c;">Error: ${err.message}</p>`;
  }
});
</script>
